queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account contributes to elevated credit default probability and serves as a key determinant of default.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how maintaining savings balances below 100 DM mitigates credit default probability and reduces exposure to primary credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: no credits taken or all previous credits paid back duly.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how a credit history with no prior borrowing or fully settled past obligations contributes to elevated credit default probability and serves as a key determinant of default.
